title: Crafting Reborn
description: A simple mod that adds more crafting recipes
body:
This mod adds new crafting recipes some examples of new crafting recipes this mod adds are

Enchanted golden apples made with 8 gold blocks and a apple

Elytras made with one popped chorus fruit, a nether star, and 6 phantom membranes

Any horse armor made with 6 of the material of the armor and one wool (ex 6 diamonds and one wool makes diamond horse armor)

this mod also makes it so you can smelt full blocks of raw material (ex a block of raw iron in a furnace or a blast furnace makes a block of iron)

and many more recipes added in this mod

It is recomended to use Just Enough Items or Roughly Enough Items so you can see all the crafting recipes

Mod made using MCreator
